title: cunigunda vulgaris
intro: Cunigunda vulgaris, also known as Larkspur, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Delphinium genus. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cunigunda vulgaris include its ability to relieve muscle spasms, reduce pain, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Cunigunda vulgaris, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
